version_description: Capo on one 1 transpose -1. Do not attempt without a capo unless you are a god.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]Gbmaj9[/ch] [ch]Fm11[/ch] [ch]Ebm11[/ch] [ch]Gbmaj9[/ch] [ch]F7#9[/ch] [ch]Bbm9[/ch]


[Verse 1]
[tab]      [ch]Gbmaj9[/ch]    [ch]Fm11[/ch]
See, first of all[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebm11[/ch]                                            [ch]Gbmaj9[/ch]
I know these so-called players wouldn't tell you this[/tab]
[tab][ch]F7#9[/ch]  [ch]Bbm7[/ch]                              [ch]Gbmaj9[/ch]
But I'ma be real and say what's on my heart[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm11[/ch] [ch]Ebm11[/ch]                                              [ch]Gbmaj9[/ch]
Let's take this chance and make this love feel relevant[/tab]
[tab] [ch]F7#9[/ch] [ch]Bbm7[/ch]
Don't you know I loved you from the start?[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Gbmaj9[/ch] [ch]Fm11[/ch] [ch]Ebm11[/ch]                                 [ch]Gbmaj9[/ch]
 When I think about All these years we've put in this relationship[/tab]
[tab][ch]F7#9[/ch] [ch]Bbm7[/ch]
 Who knew we'd make it this far?[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Gbmaj9[/ch]
Then I think about[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm11[/ch] [ch]Ebm11[/ch]                                      [ch]Gbmaj9[/ch]
Where would I be if we were to just to fall apart[/tab]
[tab] [ch]F7#9[/ch]  [ch]Bbm7[/ch]                               [ch]Bbm7[/ch]
And I can't stand the thought of losing you[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]([ch]Bbm9[/ch])             [ch]Gbmaj9[/ch]   [ch]Fm11[/ch]      [ch]Ebm11[/ch]
Meet me at the altar in your white dress[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Gbmaj9[/ch]     [ch]F7#9[/ch]           [ch]Bbm7[/ch]
We ain't getting no younger, girl, so we might as well do it[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]Gbmaj9[/ch]         [ch]Fm11[/ch]    [ch]Ebm11[/ch]
Been feeling you all the while girl that I must confess[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Gbmaj9[/ch]   [ch]F7#9[/ch]          [ch]Bbm7[/ch]
Girl, let's just get married I just wanna get married[/tab]


[Verse]
[tab]          [ch]Gbmaj9[/ch] [ch]Fm11[/ch]
Said, I done it all[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Ebm11[/ch]                                     [ch]Gbmaj9[/ch] [ch]F7#9[/ch]
But frankly girl, I'm tired of this emptiness[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm7[/ch]                               [ch]Gbmaj9[/ch]   [ch]Fm11[/ch]
I wanna come home to you and only you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebm11[/ch]                                         [ch]Gbmaj9[/ch]   [ch]F7#9[/ch]
'Cause making love to just anyone ain't happening[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm7[/ch]                    [ch]Gbmaj9[/ch]
I just gotta be with you[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Fm11[/ch]          [ch]Ebm11[/ch]                               [ch]Gbmaj9[/ch]  [ch]F7#9[/ch]
Do you think about us finishing something we started so long ago?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm7[/ch]                   [ch]Gbmaj9[/ch]
I wanna give you my all[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Fm11[/ch]      [ch]Ebm11[/ch]                             [ch]Gbmaj9[/ch]
Do you think about maybe us havin' some babies?[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]F7#9[/ch]            [ch]Bbm7[/ch]
Come on won't you be my lady?[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Bbm9[/ch]
Forever girl[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Cm11[/ch]            [ch]F7b9[/ch]
   Im ready to, commit to you[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Bbm9[/ch]       [ch]Dbmaj7/Ab[/ch]        [ch]Gb6[/ch]
and i just can't wait for tonight[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Gb[/ch]                 [ch]F7b13[/ch]
cause I need you here with me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm7[/ch]           [ch]Bbm9[/ch]       [ch]Bbm7[/ch]
Lets start a family oh[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]([ch]Bbm9[/ch])             [ch]Gbmaj9[/ch]   [ch]Fm11[/ch]      [ch]Ebm11[/ch]
Meet me at the altar in your white dress[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Gbmaj9[/ch]     [ch]F7#9[/ch]           [ch]Bbm7[/ch]
We ain't getting no younger, girl, so we might as well do it[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]Gbmaj9[/ch]         [ch]Fm11[/ch]    [ch]Ebm11[/ch]
Been feeling you all the while girl that I must confess[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Gbmaj9[/ch]   [ch]F7#9[/ch]          [ch]Bbm7[/ch]
Girl, let's just get married I just wanna get married[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]([ch]Bbm9[/ch])             [ch]Gbmaj9[/ch]   [ch]Fm11[/ch]      [ch]Ebm11[/ch]
Meet me at the altar in your white dress[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Gbmaj9[/ch]     [ch]F7#9[/ch]           [ch]Bbm7[/ch]
We ain't getting no younger, girl, so we might as well do it[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]Gbmaj9[/ch]         [ch]Fm11[/ch]    [ch]Ebm11[/ch]
Been feeling you all the while girl that I must confess[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Gbmaj9[/ch]   [ch]F7#9[/ch]          [ch]Bbm7[/ch]
Girl, let's just get married I just wanna get married[/tab]


[Outro]
N.C.
Meet me at the altar in your white dress
N.C.
We ain't getting no younger, we might as well do it
N.C.
Been feeling you all the while girl, I must confess
N.C.
 let's get married
